customManagers.description: K3s version pinned in Ansible inventory (format: v1.34.6+k3s1)
kube-vip image version in k3s-server role defaults
alertmanager-ntfy bridge image in rendered template
Wazuh agent version in deploy playbook

packageRules.description: K3s: never auto-merge. Minor upgrades MUST step through each version per CLAUDE.md K3s upgrade pitfalls section.
prBodyNotes: ⚠️ **Manual review required.** K3s minor upgrades must step through each version — no skipping (see CLAUDE.md 'K3s Agent Token Loss on Upgrade').
- [ ] Verify this is the NEXT minor (e.g. 1.34 → 1.35, not 1.34 → 1.36)
- [ ] Check the K3s release notes for breaking changes: https://github.com/k3s-io/k3s/releases
- [ ] Test on a single node first (drain + reinstall)
- [ ] Watch Longhorn engine compat (storageClass+driver+manager chart versions)
- [ ] Snapshot etcd before merging: `k3s etcd-snapshot save` on any server node

packageRules.description: kube-vip: patch versions safe to review quickly

prBodyNotes: Review kube-vip changelog — ARP mode behavior and leader-election defaults have shifted across versions.

packageRules.description: Wazuh: manual review — agent/manager must match major.minor
prBodyNotes: Wazuh agents MUST match the manager's major.minor. Only merge after upgrading the Wazuh server VM (VMID 112 on lab Proxmox) to the same version.

packageRules.description: Container images: group under one PR, avoid notification spam
